extractedPrompt: Act as an expert event planner. I run an online business that sells premium extra-virgin olive oil and I need help with planning for my seasonal harvest event. Please suggest a detailed list of things to consider for an outdoor launch event including venue, catering, guest list, entertainment, and promotional materials. Provide a table with each of the key areas you suggested along with considerations. Please also include additional columns for estimated cost and due dates. Write in a professional tone.
